source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for dense navigation UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, route metadata, and numerals.
layout: Calm map-console grids, restrained 8px radii, mist-soft borders, compact route panels, and stable navigation controls for repeated operational scanning.

prompts.label: Transparent sea fog motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sea fog bank motif for a design system named Morphous Sea Fog, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A low cold-coast sea fog bank rolling horizontally over calm sea water, layered translucent soft grey vapor with sea-blue undertones and a subtle dune-tan lower edge, shaped like a navigational weather mass rather than a cloud icon.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, long horizontal bank with softly feathered upper edge and denser lower shelf; do not crop the fog shape.
Lighting/mood: quiet cold coastal morning, muted marine atmosphere, soft diffuse light, understated premium product-system mood.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no lighthouse, no boat, no people, no dramatic storm, no cartoon icon, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sea Fog" derived from the visible sea fog bank motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from soft grey fog, sea-blue water, pale mist highlights, and dune-tan coastal undertones. This light board is the primary reference for coding a quiet navigation system.
Canvas: 3840x2160, wide 16:9 board, high-resolution, crisp readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sea Fog, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, map/navigation panel, component metric cards, token charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, quiet utilitarian navigation interface, dense but calm scanning, 8px card radius, mist-soft dividers, sea-blue focus rings, subtle tan wayfinding accents.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no marketing hero layout, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Fog", keep text large enough to read in a gallery preview.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Sea Fog design-system board. It must feel like the same quiet navigation system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible sea fog motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the soft grey fog, sea-blue navigation surfaces, dune-tan wayfinding accents, mist texture, Japanese typography coverage, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: 3840x2160, wide 16:9 board, high-resolution, crisp readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sea Fog, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep blue-grey cold-coast background, fog-white foreground text, muted sea-blue primary controls, pale mist borders, dune-tan active route markers, calm map/navigation panels, restrained status colors.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, map/navigation panel, component metric cards, token charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no generic purple gradients, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Fog", keep text large enough to read in a gallery preview.
